Appearance

Liquid Glass UIVue 3 Component Library

A stunning, beautiful UI library based on liquid glassmorphism.

Get Started
View on GitHub

Beautiful Glassmorphism

Carefully crafted variants with frosted glass aesthetics out of the box.

Highly Accessible

Powered by Radix Vue for robust screen reader and keyboard support.

Fully Customizable

Built over Tailwind CSS and Tailwind Variants for easy styling overrides.
